2026-05-11.title: GPT-5 Officially Announced by OpenAI
2026-05-11.summary: OpenAI has officially announced GPT-5, claiming significant improvements in reasoning, memory, and multimodal capabilities. The model is expected to roll out to users over the coming weeks.

2026-05-11.title: Google Unveils New Quantum Computing Chip
2026-05-11.summary: Google's new quantum chip 'Willow' achieves breakthrough in error correction, paving the way for practical quantum computing. The chip demonstrates exponential error reduction.

2026-05-11.title: Apple Reports Record Revenue from Services
2026-05-11.summary: Apple's services segment hit a new all-time high, driven by App Store, Apple Music, and iCloud growth. Hardware sales showed modest gains with strong iPhone 17 demand.

2026-05-11.title: Microsoft Azure AI Enhances Enterprise Tools
2026-05-11.summary: Microsoft announced new AI-powered features for Azure, including automated code generation and advanced data analytics for enterprise customers.

2026-05-11.title: Tesla AI Robotaxi Service Launches in Pilot Cities
2026-05-11.summary: Tesla has begun testing its AI-powered robotaxi service in select US cities, with plans to expand internationally by year-end.
